title: GitHub Actions CI Workflow

dod_evidence.description: .github/workflows/ci.yml created with validate, lint, and schema freshness jobs
uv run ruff check scripts/ passes locally before push
uv run python scripts/validate.py exits 0 on clean repo
uv run python scripts/validate.py --export-schema + git diff --exit-code schemas/frontmatter.schema.json passes (schema in sync)
